## Validation

- [ ] `uvx pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] All GitHub checks pass
- [ ] `@stonecharioteer` has reviewed the PR

## Exercise contribution checklist

If this PR adds or changes exercises:

- [ ] Exercise file exists under `exercises/<category>/<name>.go`
- [ ] Solution file exists under `solutions/<category>/<name>.go`
- [ ] TOML metadata exists under `exercises/<category>/<name>.toml`
- [ ] Category has at least 3 complete exercise sets
